footer_description: A community-driven platform for challenge run speedrunners and enthusiasts.
footer_copyright_notice: Game content and images are property of their respective owners.
footer_copyright: © {year} Challenge Run Community. All rights reserved.
signin_description: Sign in to submit runs, manage your profile, and track your achievements.
signin_first_time: First time here? Just click one of the buttons below to sign up via Discord or Twitch.
signin_generic_error: Failed to start sign in. Please try again.
signin_agree: By signing in, you agree to our {terms_link} and {privacy_link}.
debug_submissions_disabled: Submissions are disabled in debug mode
sign_in_required_submit: You need to be signed in to submit a run.
home_subtitle: A space built around creative challenge runs, clear rules, and respect for all challenge styles.
home_news_empty: News and updates will appear here.
home_bounty_empty: No active bounties yet. Check back soon!
home_request_empty: Want to post a bounty or request? Contact us!
search_hint: Start typing to search across games, runners, runs, and teams.
games_description: Browse all tracked games and their challenge runs.
game_modded_banner: This is a {bold_start}modded version{bold_end}. Looking for the vanilla game?
game_modded_available: {bold_start}Modded versions available!{bold_end} Run with custom content.
game_desc_needed: 📝 Game description needed. Want to help? {link_start}Visit the Resources tab{link_end} to learn how to contribute.
game_rules_default: Core rules that apply to all runs:
game_rules_specific: Core rules that apply to all {name} runs:
game_video_required_desc: All submissions must include video proof
game_no_cheats_desc: External tools or gameplay-altering mods are not allowed
game_rules_detail_link: For detailed category rules, challenges, restrictions, and glitch policies, see the {link_start}Rules tab{link_end}.
game_community_achievements_desc: Community-defined challenges tracked for this game.
game_no_runners_yet: No runners tracking this achievement yet. Be the first!
game_credits_desc: Contributors who helped establish this game's challenge run definitions:
game_history_changes_desc: A record of updates made to this game's data.
game_history_achievements_desc: Achievements defined for this game's community.
game_history_no_achievements: No community achievements have been created for this game yet.
game_history_milestones_desc: Notable community-wide milestones and records for this game.
game_resources_desc: Useful tools, mods, and external resources for {name} challenge runs.
game_resources_empty_desc: No resources have been added yet.
game_resources_empty_cta: Want to contribute? Contact a moderator!
game_runs_no_categories: No run categories have been set up for this game yet.
game_runs_check_back: Check back later or {link_start}suggest an update{link_end}.
game_category_no_runs: No runs have been submitted for this category yet.
game_category_empty: No approved runs yet. Be the first!
game_rules_page_desc: Official rules, category definitions, and challenge guidelines for {name}.
game_rb_subtitle: 📌 Rule Builder — Build your ruleset and find runners
runners_description: Browse challenge runners and their achievements.
news_description: Announcements and updates from the Challenge Run Community.
glossary_description: Definitions for gameplay interactions and challenge run terminology used across CRC. These are our community standards — individual games may define terms differently on their rules pages.
rules_description: Global rules that apply to all CRC submissions. Individual games may have additional rules on their game pages.
rules_unseeded: Runs must be {bold_start}unseeded{bold_end} unless the category specifies otherwise.
rules_no_cheats: No cheats, mods, or gameplay-altering tools unless in a modded category.
rules_full_run: Videos must show the {bold_start}full run{bold_end} from start to finish.
rules_own_gameplay: Submissions must be your own gameplay — no submitting on behalf of others.
rules_game_specific_desc: Each game has its own detailed rules. Visit a game's Rules tab for specifics.
submit_description: Select a game to begin your submission.
submit_hint: Or go to a game's page and click "Submit Run" from there.
submit_no_game_found: Don't see your game? {link_start}Request a new game{link_end}
submit_run_description: Fill in your run details below. All options are specific to {game_name}.
submit_run_category_sub: Select the run tier and category.
submit_run_platform_required: This game requires a platform selection.
submit_run_platform_optional: What platform did you play on? Optional but helpful for verification.
submit_run_challenges_sub: Select all challenges completed in this run.
submit_run_challenge_required: This challenge is required for the selected category.
submit_run_restrictions_sub: Select any optional restrictions applied to this run.
submit_run_restrictions_click_group: Click a group to see options.
submit_run_restriction_required: This restriction is required for the selected category.
submit_run_timing_both: Enter your RTA (real-time) and {label} times. Both are optional but help with verification.
submit_run_timing_single: Enter your run time. Format: HH:MM:SS or MM:SS. Optional but recommended.
submit_run_date_sub: When was this run completed? Optional — will use submission date if left blank.
submit_run_video_error: Must be a YouTube, Twitch, or supported video URL
submit_run_notes_sub: Optional notes about your run (strategy, memorable moments, attempts count, etc.). Max 500 characters.
submit_run_notes_placeholder: e.g. 'First clear after 47 attempts! Almost died to the final boss.'
submit_run_locked_hint: Locked by category — this {label} is required for this challenge.
submit_game_page_title: Request a Game | Challenge Run Community
submit_game_description: Suggest a new game for the Challenge Run Community. Fill in as much as you can — our team will review and refine.
submit_game_required_hint: Fields marked {req} are required. Everything else is optional but helps us set up the game faster.
submit_game_draft_banner: You have a saved draft for this form.
submit_game_draft_hint: You can save a draft of this submission at the bottom of the screen if you want to return to it later.
submit_game_game_name_hint: Please use the full game name.
submit_game_checking: Checking if this game already exists…
submit_game_exists_pending: {name} has already been submitted and is awaiting review
submit_game_add_suggestions_desc: You can add your suggestions below to help shape the game page.
submit_game_first_submit: This game hasn't been submitted yet — you're the first!
submit_game_cover_upload: Click to upload a cover image
submit_game_cover_hint: Recommended: 460×215px (Steam capsule). Accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 5MB.
submit_game_cover_url_fallback: Or paste an external image URL
submit_game_other_platforms_hint: Don't see your platform? Add up to 2 here. These will be reviewed by our team.
submit_game_other_genres_hint: Don't see a genre that fits? Add up to 3 custom genres (counts toward the 5 max). These will be reviewed by our team.
submit_game_max_genres: Maximum of 5 genres reached ({selected} selected + {custom} custom).
submit_game_full_runs_desc: Full runs typically involve completing the game through to the credits.
submit_game_mini_challenges_desc: Smaller challenges like individual boss fights, individual levels, or small gauntlets. Groups can have child categories.
submit_game_standard_challenges_desc: Select challenge types that apply. You can add exceptions for each. Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_custom_challenge_toggle: My challenge is not listed here
submit_game_custom_challenge_hint: Suggest a challenge type that would be applicable to a majority of games. Our team will review it.
submit_game_characters_toggle: This game requires you pick a character, weapon, or class before starting the game.
submit_game_characters_min_hint: At least 2 options are required when characters are enabled.
submit_game_column_label_hint: What do you call it? "Character", "Weapon", "Weapon / Aspect", "Class", "Loadout", etc.
submit_game_restrictions_desc: Optional restrictions. A restriction can have children (e.g. "One God Only" → "Zeus Only"). Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_glitch_presets_desc: Select glitch policies that apply to this game.
submit_game_nmg_hint: Help our team understand what NMG means for this specific game.
submit_game_custom_glitches_desc: Custom glitch policies unique to this game. Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_rules_hint: These should be rules that apply to any and all challenges.
submit_game_rules_review: These will be reviewed and refined by our team.
submit_game_involvement_question: How would you like to be involved?
submit_game_supporter_desc: Your input will help our team build the best game page. All contributions are attributed and preserved — nobody can overwrite your suggestions.
submit_game_val_category: Please add at least 1 run category — click to go there
submit_game_val_challenge: Please select at least 1 challenge type — click to go there
submit_game_val_characters: Characters enabled — at least 2 options required — click to go there
submit_game_fl_hint: Add characters in the Characters tab or restrictions in the Restrictions tab to select fixed loadout options here.
error_404_message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
profile_my_runs_desc: Your submitted runs will appear here once you've linked your runner profile.
profile_my_achievements_desc: Your community achievements will appear here once you've linked your runner profile.
profile_status_no_profile_desc: You haven't created a runner profile yet.
profile_status_review_time: Your profile is being reviewed by a moderator. This usually takes {bold_start}1-2 days{bold_end}.
profile_status_review_desc: You'll be able to submit runs and participate in the community once your profile is approved. In the meantime, feel free to browse games and check out other runners' profiles!
profile_status_try_again_desc: You can create a new profile with the issues addressed.
profile_status_approved_desc: Your profile is live. You can now submit runs and participate in the community.
link_callback_please_wait: Please wait while we link your account.
link_callback_success_desc: Your {provider} account has been linked successfully.
link_callback_error_default: Account linking failed. Please try again.
settings_linked_desc: Accounts you've connected to CRC. You can sign in with any of these.
settings_keep_one: You must keep at least one linked account
settings_security_desc: Sign out from all devices and sessions.
settings_data_rights_desc: Under GDPR, CCPA, and other privacy laws, you can exercise the following rights directly from this page — no email needed.
settings_access_export_desc: Download a full copy of your CRC data (profile, runs, achievements, support history) in JSON format.
settings_export_failed: Failed to export data. Please try again.
settings_correction_desc: Update your display name, bio, social links, and other profile info at any time.
settings_consent_desc: Change your cookie and analytics preferences. Analytics are only active if you've opted in.
settings_deletion_desc: Permanently delete your account and personal data. See the Danger Zone below.
settings_privacy_contact: For rights not covered here (restriction, objection, or complaints), contact {email_start}privacy@challengerun.net{email_end}. We respond within 30 days. See our {link_start}Privacy Policy{link_end} for full details.
settings_danger_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings_delete_note: Your personal data will be deleted and run records will be anonymized. This cannot be undone.
setup_page_title: Set Up Your Profile | Challenge Run Community
setup_subtitle: Pick a runner ID to get started. This is your unique handle on the site — it'll appear in your profile URL and on leaderboards.
setup_id_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
setup_display_placeholder: How you want to be known
setup_display_hint: This is what people see. You can change it later.
setup_note: You can fill out the rest of your profile later from the settings menu. You'll need a runner ID before you can submit runs.
create_page_title: Create Runner Profile | Challenge Run Community
create_has_profile_desc: You can view or edit your existing profile.
create_pending_desc: Your profile is awaiting moderator review. You'll be notified once it's approved.
create_customize_later: You can customize more after approval.
create_runner_id_rules: lowercase letters (a-z), numbers (0-9), hyphens (-). Min 3 characters.
create_display_hint: How your name appears on the site (2–50 characters)
create_representing_hint: Show a different flag (solidarity, heritage, etc.)
create_social_hint: All optional — add any profiles you'd like to show.
create_customization_desc: Once approved, you'll be able to add a banner, accent color, featured runs, personal goals, and more via Edit Profile.
create_moderation_desc: Your profile will be reviewed by a moderator before it appears on the site. This usually takes 1-2 days. You'll be able to submit runs once approved.
theme_desc: Personalize your CRC experience. Changes show in the preview — click Save to apply.
theme_text_outline_desc: Adds a subtle outline for readability on busy backgrounds
theme_preview_desc: This is how your theme will look across the site.
theme_preview_tags_desc: How tags appear on run tables
theme_sign_in_sync: Sign in to sync across devices
edit_desc: Update your runner profile. Changes save instantly (except "Other Links" which require approval).
edit_pending_warning: ⏳ Your profile is pending approval. You can view your profile details, but editing is locked until an admin approves it.
edit_other_links_approval: Other links require moderator approval before appearing on your profile.
suggest_desc: Notice something incorrect or missing on this game's pages? Let us know and we'll get it fixed.
suggest_sign_in: to suggest an update to this page.
suggest_success_desc: A moderator will review it shortly.
suggest_details_placeholder: Be as specific as possible. For example: 'The Hitless category incorrectly states you cannot take environmental damage, but the community consensus is...'
suggest_submit_error: Failed to submit. Please try again.
support_desc: Get help, submit content, or connect with the Challenge Run Community.
support_submit_content_desc: Help grow the CRC database by submitting runs and games.
support_submit_run_desc: Record your achievement with video proof
support_request_game_desc: Suggest a game to add to CRC
support_connect_desc: Join the community and get help from other runners.
support_discord_desc: Chat, ask questions, and find running partners
support_staff_desc: CRC is maintained by a volunteer team. Here's how the team is organized:
support_super_admins_desc: Full platform oversight. Manage all games, users, staff roles, and site configuration. Handle escalations, compliance, and disaster recovery.
support_admins_desc: Review and approve new game submissions, manage runner profiles, and handle community reports. Can assign moderator and verifier roles.
support_game_mods_desc: Assigned per game. Maintain game data accuracy, review community-submitted game updates, and manage category definitions and rules.
support_verifiers_desc: Assigned per game. Watch submitted run videos, verify they meet category requirements, and approve or reject run submissions.
support_join_team: Interested in joining the team? Reach out on {link_start}Discord{link_end}. We're always looking for knowledgeable community members to help moderate and verify runs.
support_faq_submit_q: How do I submit a run?
support_faq_submit_a: Go to the {link_start}Submit a Run{link_end} page, select your game and category, enter your runner name, paste your video URL (YouTube or Twitch), and submit. A verifier will review your run and approve it if it meets the requirements.
support_faq_hit_a: A {bold_start}hit{bold_end} is any contact from an enemy or hazard. {bold_start}Damage{bold_end} is health loss. These can differ — a blocked attack may be a hit but not damage. Each game defines these specifically on its rules page. See our {link_start}Glossary{link_end} for general definitions.
support_faq_video_q: What video proof do I need?
support_faq_video_a: A full, unedited recording of your run showing the claimed challenge. The video must be hosted on YouTube or Twitch. Make sure the game audio and visuals are clear enough to verify.
support_faq_verify_a: Verification times depend on game moderator availability and video length. Most runs are reviewed within a few days. Complex or long runs may take longer.
support_faq_new_game_q: Can I submit runs for a game not on CRC?
support_faq_new_game_a: Yes! Use the {link_start}Request a New Game{link_end} form. Include the game name, suggested categories, and any challenge definitions specific to that game.
support_faq_profile_q: How do I create a runner profile?
support_faq_profile_a: Sign in with Discord or Twitch, then visit {link_start}Create Profile{link_end}. Choose a runner ID, add your display name, bio, and social links. Your profile will be reviewed before going public.
support_faq_data_q: Can I edit or delete my data?
support_faq_data_a: Yes. You can edit your profile through {link_start}account settings{link_end}. To export or delete your data, use the buttons on your settings page. We comply with GDPR and CCPA.
support_faq_suggest_q: How do I suggest a correction to a game page?
support_faq_suggest_a: Navigate to the game's page and click the {bold_start}Suggest an Update{bold_end} tab. Fill out the form and a game moderator will review it.
support_faq_moderation_q: Who can I contact about a moderation issue?
support_faq_moderation_a: For run verification disputes, reach out on {discord_start}Discord{discord_end}. For serious concerns, email {email_start}support@challengerun.net{email_end}.
support_privacy_desc: Exercise your data rights under GDPR, CCPA, and other privacy regulations.
support_privacy_settings_hint: You can also manage your data directly from {link_start}Account Settings{link_end}.
support_privacy_email_hint: We'll respond to this email within 30 days.
support_privacy_details_placeholder: Describe your request. Include your CRC runner ID or display name if applicable.
support_privacy_details_hint: Minimum 10 characters. Be specific so we can process your request quickly.
support_privacy_export_hint: You can export your data instantly from {link_start}Account Settings{link_end} without waiting for a manual response.
support_privacy_delete_hint: You can delete your account instantly from {link_start}Account Settings{link_end} → Danger Zone.
support_privacy_mailto_hint: Your request will be pre-filled in your email client. You can also copy the text and send it manually to {bold_start}privacy@challengerun.net{bold_end}.
support_contact_desc: For support requests, privacy inquiries, or issues not covered above:
support_contact_response: Response times vary. Discord is fastest for general questions. Privacy requests are processed within 30 days per GDPR.
support_resources_rules: Universal rules that apply to all games on CRC
support_resources_guidelines: Code of conduct for the community
guidelines_intro: These guidelines describe how the CRC community operates. They are not a legal contract — they are expectations for all users. Violation of these guidelines may result in content removal, account suspension, or a permanent ban at our discretion. For legal terms, see our {link_start}Terms of Service{link_end}.
guidelines_conduct_intro: CRC is a community space. Treat others with respect. The following are not tolerated:
guidelines_conduct_harassment: Harassment, threats, stalking, or abuse of any kind
guidelines_conduct_doxxing: Doxxing or sharing personal information of others without consent
guidelines_conduct_impersonation: Impersonating other users or community figures
guidelines_conduct_spam: Spam, self-promotion outside designated areas, or disruptive behavior
guidelines_conduct_illegal: Promotion of illegal activities, self-harm, or violence
guidelines_conduct_laws: Users need to follow applicable local, state, national, and international laws when using the site.
guidelines_content_intro: All content submitted to CRC (profiles, runs, comments) must not:
guidelines_content_laws: Violate applicable laws or the rights of others
guidelines_content_malware: Contain malware, phishing, or deceptive material
guidelines_content_offensive: Include offensive, hateful, or inappropriate imagery or language in profile fields, banners, or avatars
guidelines_content_reserve: We reserve the right to remove content that violates these guidelines or that we deem inappropriate for the community.
guidelines_submissions_video: Valid video proof (unedited, continuous footage where required by game rules)
guidelines_submissions_compliance: Compliance with game-specific and category-specific rules
guidelines_submissions_responsibility: Each game page lists its specific rules. It is your responsibility to read and follow them before submitting. Submissions that do not meet the requirements may be rejected.
guidelines_cheating_intro: The following are considered cheating and will result in rejection of the submission. Repeated offenses will result in a ban.
guidelines_cheating_fraudulent: Submitting fraudulent, faked, or manipulated runs
guidelines_cheating_splicing: Splicing, editing, or manipulating video evidence
guidelines_cheating_tools: Using cheats, hacks, save states, or tools that provide unfair advantages (unless explicitly allowed by game/category rules)
guidelines_cheating_misrepresent: Misrepresenting the platform, version, or conditions of a run
guidelines_cheating_detection: We may use any available methods to detect cheating, including community reports, video analysis, and statistical analysis.
guidelines_verification_p1: Submissions are reviewed by designated verifiers or moderators. Verification decisions are made at the discretion of the moderation team based on the evidence provided and applicable rules. We may accept, reject, or request additional information for any submission.
guidelines_verification_p2: Please allow a reasonable amount of time for verification. Moderators are volunteers with lives outside the site. Do not repeatedly message moderators about pending submissions.
guidelines_moderation_intro: Moderators and verifiers are community members entrusted with maintaining the quality and integrity of the site. They are expected to:
guidelines_moderation_impartial: Remain impartial and treat all users fairly
guidelines_moderation_standards: Follow the verification standards for their assigned games
guidelines_moderation_no_abuse: Not abuse their privileges for personal benefit
guidelines_moderation_privacy: Respect user privacy and handle data responsibly
guidelines_moderation_removal: Moderators who abuse their position may be removed. If you have concerns about a moderator's conduct, contact us via the {link_start}Support Page{link_end}.
guidelines_data_intro: CRC takes user privacy seriously. All community members — especially moderators and verifiers — are expected to respect the privacy of others and handle personal data responsibly.
guidelines_data_no_share: Do not share, screenshot, or discuss another user's private information (email, IP address, linked accounts) outside of moderation purposes.
guidelines_data_mod_access: Moderators must only access user data when necessary for their role and must not retain personal data beyond the scope of their moderation duties.
guidelines_data_no_identify: Do not attempt to identify anonymous or pseudonymous users through technical means, social engineering, or cross-referencing external data.
guidelines_data_vulnerability: If you discover a security vulnerability or data exposure, report it to {email_start}privacy@challengerun.net{email_end} immediately. Do not exploit or publicly disclose it.
guidelines_data_manage: You can manage your own data — including exporting, editing, and deleting your account — through your {link_start}Account Settings{link_end}. For full details on how we handle your data, see our {link_start2}Privacy Policy{link_end2}.
guidelines_appeals_p1: If your submission is rejected or your account is actioned, you may appeal by contacting us through the {link_start}Support Page{link_end}. Appeals are reviewed by a different member of the moderation team where possible. Please include any relevant context or evidence with your appeal.
guidelines_enforcement_intro: Violations of these guidelines may result in any of the following, depending on severity:
guidelines_enforcement_severe: Severe violations (cheating, harassment, security threats) may result in immediate action without prior warning. These guidelines are not exhaustive — we reserve the right to take action on behavior not explicitly listed here if it is harmful to the community.
submissions_description: Track and manage your pending submissions.
submissions_no_rejected: No rejected submissions in the last 30 days.
submissions_no_history: No approved submissions in the last 30 days.
submissions_locked_message: A reviewer is currently looking at this submission. Editing and withdrawing are disabled.
submissions_rejected_message: Sorry, but your {type} was rejected. Please see notes for more information.
submissions_withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this submission? This cannot be undone.
admin_access_denied_role: The {role} role does not have access to this page.
admin_access_denied_hint: Use the Exit Debug button in the debug bar above to return to your real role, or switch to a different role from the debug bar's Navigate menu.
admin_denied_message: You need verifier, moderator, admin, or super admin privileges to access the dashboard.
admin_nav_games_desc: Review pending games and manage approved submissions.
admin_nav_profiles_desc: Review pending profiles and manage approved submissions.
admin_nav_game_editor_desc: Edit game configs — categories, restrictions, rules, characters.
admin_nav_users_desc: Manage users and assign staff roles.
admin_nav_game_updates_desc: Review pending updates and manage approved corrections.
admin_nav_runs_desc: Review pending runs and manage approved runs.
admin_nav_reports_desc: Review user-submitted reports on runners, runs, and games.
admin_verifier_required: You need verifier, moderator, or admin privileges to review runs.
cookie_banner_text: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences. We also use analytics cookies to understand how you use the site. {link_start}Learn more{link_end}
cookie_settings_desc: Choose which cookies you allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the site to function.
cookie_essential_desc: Authentication, security, and your theme/display preferences. Required for the site to work.
cookie_analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it. All data is anonymized — no personal data is tracked.
auth_guard_desc: A non-user visiting this page would be redirected to {link_start}Sign In{link_end}.
auth_guard_hint: Switch to {bold_start}User{bold_end} or higher in the debug bar to see this page's content.
report_desc: Help us improve by reporting issues. All reports are anonymous.
report_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
terms_page_title: Terms of Service | Challenge Run Community

edit_representing_hint: Show a different flag on your profile (solidarity, heritage, etc.)
edit_status_hint: Short status shown on your profile
edit_hide_activity: Hide Activity tab on my profile
edit_hide_activity_hint: When enabled, other visitors won't see your Activity timeline.

admin_profiles_custom_links: These users have submitted custom social links that need approval.

admin_news_excerpt_hint: Brief description shown in the news feed and homepage carousel. Keep it under 1-2 sentences.
admin_news_image_hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP — max 5MB. Used as the post header image.
admin_news_author_hint: Defaults to your runner ID if left blank.
admin_users_export_desc: Full data export for a specific user — includes profile, runs, achievements, linked accounts, support tickets, and all associated records.
admin_users_export_admin_only: User data exports are available to admins only. If you need an export for a data subject request, please contact an admin.

ge_general_upload_hint: Click to upload a cover image
ge_general_paste_url: Or paste an external image URL
ge_general_cover_hint: Recommended: 460×215px (Steam capsule). Accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 5MB.

ge_cat_define_first: Define characters, challenges, or restrictions in their respective tabs first.
ge_ch_standard_desc: Challenge types runners can apply (e.g. Hitless, Damageless). Descriptions support Markdown.
ge_ch_glitch_desc: Glitch policies (e.g. Unrestricted, No Major Glitches, Glitchless). Descriptions support Markdown.
ge_ch_nmg_desc: Describe what NMG (No Major Glitches) means for this game specifically. Markdown supported.
ge_rest_desc: Optional restrictions. A restriction can have children (e.g. "One God Only" → "Hestia Only"). Both parent and children are selectable by runners. Descriptions support Markdown.
ge_custom_desc: Enable up to 2 custom content tabs for this game. Use these for paths, strategies, resources, or any game-specific content.
ge_history_desc: Every save creates a snapshot of the previous state. Admins can rollback to any snapshot.
ge_history_empty: No snapshots yet. They are created automatically when you save changes.
ge_rules_hint: Markdown supported. These rules are displayed on the game's Rules tab.
ge_review_edit_hint: Edit the submission data below, then add review notes and save. The submitter will be notified.
ge_review_notes_hint: Summarize what you changed and why. This will be sent to the submitter.
ge_review_drag_hint: Drag to position. Use the slider to zoom. The visible area will be the cover image (460×215).
edit_socials_hint: Add links to your streaming and social accounts.
edit_banner_aspect: Uses 3:1 aspect ratio (e.g. 1200×400 or 1920×640). PNG, JPG, or WebP, max 5MB.
edit_banner_drag_frame: Drag inside the frame to choose which part of your image is shown.
edit_other_links_limit: Up to 3 additional links (must be valid URLs)
edit_goals_hint: Set personal challenges and milestones. These are visible on your profile.
edit_goals_empty: No goals yet. Add one below!
edit_highlights_hint: Pin up to 3 highlights to the top of your profile — a single run or an entire playlist.
edit_highlights_limit: Up to 3 highlights. Mix and match runs and playlists.
edit_highlights_empty: No highlights yet. Add one below!
edit_hl_no_runs: No published runs found. Submit and get a run approved first!
edit_hl_playlist_hint: YouTube playlist, Twitch collection, or any direct URL.
edit_hl_label_hint: Optional label shown on your profile card.
edit_hl_cover_hint: Optional — a thumbnail shown on your profile card. Leave blank for a default look.
sg_nmg_hint: Help our team understand what NMG means for this specific game.
sg_aliases_hint: Comma-separated. Include abbreviations, acronyms, or alternate titles people commonly use for this game.
sg_categories_hint: Comma-separated. What categories should this game have?
sg_char_label_hint: What do you call it? "Character", "Weapon", "Weapon / Aspect", "Class", "Loadout", etc.
sg_char_min: At least 2 options are required when characters are enabled.
sg_fixed_loadout_hint: Add characters in the Characters tab or restrictions in the Restrictions tab to select fixed loadout options here.
sg_contribution_note: Your input will help our team build the best game page. All contributions are attributed and preserved — nobody can overwrite your suggestions.
sub_update_images_hint: Images from original submission. To change images, withdraw and resubmit.
sub_update_not_pending: This submission is no longer pending and cannot be edited.
runner_runs_empty: No runs have been added yet.
runner_contrib_verifies: Games this runner verifies runs for.
sub_game_not_pending: This submission is no longer pending and cannot be edited.
sub_game_structured_hint: These fields were set during your initial submission. To change categories, challenges, characters, or restrictions, please withdraw this submission and resubmit with corrections.
forum_desc: The forum feature is under development.
forum_discord_hint: In the meantime, join us on Discord to chat with the community!
guides_desc: Community guides and tutorials are on the way.
msg_sign_in_required: You must be signed in to view messages.
msg_empty_hint: Start a conversation by clicking New Message.
msg_thread_sign_in: Sign in to view this conversation.
msg_thread_empty: No messages in this conversation yet.
msg_new_sign_in_required: You must be signed in to send messages.
msg_new_hint: Search for a user by name or runner ID.
